creator: tagattie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 204868
Patch

plata-theme has been updated to 0.8.4.

Upstream changes:
- Followed upstream changes of GtkPopover (Gtk 4.0).
- Followed upstream changes of GtkMenuBar (Gtk 4.0).
- Added some ugly workarounds for Filezilla built with gtk-3-ed wxWidgets (Gtk 3.2x/4.0).
- Added Void Linux source package link (README.md).

https://gitlab.com/tista500/plata-theme/tags/0.8.4

QA:
poudriere testport OK (releng/12.0 amd64)
